blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect powder.
